summary: Iteration 8 Testing Complete - All new VIP features working correctly. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: VIP Directory correctly gates contact info based on subscription status or VIP pass
Trial system properly activates 7-day trial and tracks usage
Cancellation fees are tier-based as specified (Prime $1.99, Pro $4.99, Ultra $9.99, Mega $14.99)
Avatar presets correctly distinguish between free and premium options
Emoji picker component is reusable across Feed, Chat, and Settings
VIP Directory link properly added to sidebar navigation
seed_data_creation: Trial activated for freeuser@test.com during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All VIP features tested and working: 1) VIP Directory at /vip-directory shows breeders with search and species filters, contact info gated for non-subscribers. 2) VIP Pass purchase creates Stripe checkout for $4.99. 3) 7-day trial activates for free users (freeuser@test.com now on prime trial). 4) Trial status endpoint returns correct info. 5) Cancel subscription creates checkout with tier-based fee. 6) Avatar presets endpoint returns free/premium flags, premium avatars blocked for free users. 7) Emoji picker works in Feed, Chat, and Settings. 8) Membership page shows trial badge and cancel button with fee.

vip_directory_page.notes: Shows breeders with search and species filter, contact info gated for non-subscribers

vip_directory_search.notes: Search by name, kennel, specializations works

vip_directory_species_filter.notes: Filter by Dogs, Cats, Birds, etc. works

vip_directory_contact_gating.notes: Contact info visible for paid subscribers and VIP pass holders, hidden for free users

vip_pass_purchase.notes: Creates Stripe checkout for $4.99, blocked for existing subscribers

trial_start.notes: Activates 7-day trial for free users, blocked for subscribers and users who already used trial

trial_expiry_check.notes: Auto-downgrades expired trials to free tier

cancel_subscription.notes: Creates Stripe checkout for cancellation fee, blocked for free users

cancellation_fee.notes: Returns tier-based fee (Prime $1.99, Pro $4.99, Ultra $9.99, Mega $14.99)

avatar_presets.notes: Returns presets with free/premium flags and is_subscriber status

avatar_update.notes: Updates avatar, premium avatars blocked for free users

emoji_picker_feed.notes: Emoji picker opens in Feed post creation, adds emoji to textarea

emoji_picker_chat.notes: Emoji picker opens in Chat widget input

emoji_picker_settings.notes: Emoji picker opens in Settings bio textarea

membership_page_trial.notes: Shows trial badge with days remaining for trial users

membership_page_cancel.notes: Shows cancel button with fee for paid users

sidebar_vip_directory.notes: VIP Directory link in sidebar under Registry section
